rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Or Tax Moskovitz Memorandum Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, October 19, 2015, Line 1)DEFENDANT CATALINA BOYKIN Motion To Strike Or Tax Moskovitz Memorandum Of Costs is GRANTED, no opposition filed. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Paula Buckley, John Adams, Stephen Abrush, Linell Brandon And Tony Aumavae'S Motion For Protective Order Denying Defendants Civic Center Hotel, Llc And Balwantsinh Thakors' Demand For Inspection Of Units
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, October 19, 2015, Line 2) Plaintiffs Paula Buckley, John Adams, Stephen Abrush, Linell Brandon And Tony Aumavae'S Motion For Protective Order Denying Defendants Civic Center Hotel, Llc And Balwantsinh Thakors' Demand For Inspection Of Units is DENIED AS MOOT. Following proceedings before the Discovery Hearing Officer, the parties met and conferred and then submitted papers confirming their agreement that the site inspection will occur over two consecutive days. Any further dispute arising after that agreement was reached - e.g., as to the scope of inspections - is to be brought, if at all, in a new motion. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is DENIED. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN COCHRANE VS. VLADIMIR FEDEROV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration By Defendants/Petitioners Vladimir Fedorov And Galina Fedorova
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, October 19, 2015, Line 4) (Part 1 of 2) DEFENDANT VLADIMIR FEDEROV, GALINA FEDOROVA Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration By Defendants/Petitioners Vladimir Fedorov And Galina Fedorova is GRANTED. The Court finds that the arbitration clause in the parties' agreement - e.g., "any dispute relating to this agreement or the Property" - encompasses the second and third counts of the three-count complaint. No attorneys' fees are awarded. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: INAM SHAMI ET AL VS. NENITA QUIJANO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: eal Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, October 19, 2015, Line 6) DEFENDANT NENITA QUIJANO DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED.
